Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input A pseudo BPMN representation of a multinational smartphone supply chain process from market research to sales cycle adjustment Task Generate 20 open ended thought provoking questions Focus Areas Rationale behind process flows potential improvements risk management decision making stakeholder communication and performance measurement Constraint Do not provide any SQL queries Just list the questions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Process Flow Start Market Research RD Prototype Parallel Split Secure Components Taiwan Japan South Korea Germany USA Parallel Join Ship to Malaysia Assembly Assemble 24 7 Exclusive Gateway Quality Checks Pass Continue Fail Rework Scrap Return to Assembly Pack Label Parallel Split Air Freight High Demand vs Cargo Ship Other Parallel Join Customs Compliance Receive at Regional DCs Parallel Split Warehousing Retailers E Commerce VIP Pre orders Parallel Join Monitor Inventory Sales Exclusive Gateway Adjust Orders vs Next Cycle End

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Brainstorming Question Categories Rationale Strategy Why these specific locations Why parallel splits Risk Management Supply chain disruptions geopolitical issues quality failures Improvement Efficiency Bottlenecks automation sustainability Decision Making Criteria for air vs sea rework vs scrap Stakeholder Communication Suppliers regulators customers internal teams Performance Measurement KPIs lead times cost vs quality

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review and Refine Check against constraints 20 questions Yes Open ended Yes No SQL Yes Cover focus areas Yes Refine wording for clarity and depth Ensure they sound thought provoking

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refinement on Q1 Make it more about strategic dependency Refinement on Q4 Focus on the cost benefit analysis of rework Refinement on Q10 Connect sustainability to the specific Scrap node Refinement on Q16 Ensure it touches on the process boundary End Event

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Polish Self Correction during drafting Make sure I do not accidentally number them in a way that looks like code Just a numbered list Ensure the tone is professional and analytical

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Re evaluating Q16 The prompt asks about the process described Returns might be out of scope but asking about the limit of the process is valid Lets adjust to focus on the feedback loop from the end back to the start Re evaluating Q5 Focus on the trade off Re evaluating Q9 Focus on supply chain resilience Final Count Check 1 to 20
